en.extract:
The Kangean tit-babbler (Mixornis prillwitzi) is a species of bird in the Old World babbler family Timaliidae that is endemic to the Kangean Islands in Indonesia.
Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest.

The '''Kangean tit-babbler''' ('''''Mixornis prillwitzi''''') is a species of bird in the [[Old World babbler]] family [[Timaliidae]] that is [[Endemism|endemic]] to the [[Kangean Islands]] in [[Indonesia]].<ref name="iucn" />

Its natural [[habitat]] is [[subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest]].
